creator: Chris Huber Reitz
name: Taylor & Francis
quote: Generative AI tools must not be listed as an author because such tools are unable to assume responsibility for the submitted content or manage copyright and licensing agreements. These are uniquely human responsibilities that cannot be undertaken by Generative AI tools.
